tracks.meaning: a gesture, sound, or action intended to convey information or instructions to someone
an electrical or electromagnetic impulse or wave carrying information in telecommunications or broadcasting
an order or command given to troops, especially a military alert or warning
a sequence of electrical impulses or data representing information in a computer or digital system
a clinical symptom or sign indicating the presence of a disease or medical condition
a notable indication or sign of commercial opportunity or market trend
to make a gesture or movement to communicate a message or give a warning
a traffic light or sign indicating legal right of way or prohibition
an observable indicator or cue that conveys meaning or intention in human behavior
a notable or impressive achievement or event worth attention
a direction or instruction written into a musical score indicating how to perform a passage
a chemical or physical stimulus that an organism responds to or reacts upon
